sections.heading: Print it Better
sections.text: Print it Better Get high quality 3D-printed parts fast with support from engineers who know additive inside and out. Build high-performing, reliable parts with six 3D printing technologies and 60+ materials. Learn More

sections.heading: Custom Finishing
sections.text: Custom Finishing Custom finishing options to meet your exact specifications are available. Plastics Clear Coat Applied to plastic parts to create a clear, glossy finish. Ideal for lenses and other optical applications. Thermal Cure Enhance mechanical properties of Accura 5530 and PerForm. This process does make parts more brittle. Plating Electroless nickel plating adds strength and durability to plastic parts. Painting Parts can be painted to match any Pantone number. For best results, parts are typically sanded and polished before applying paint. Dyeing Dyeing is a low-cost option when a material’s natural color is not desired. Color options include black, green, red, blue, and yellow. Te...
